name: langchain-insumer
summary: LangChain tools for InsumerAPI — condition-based access across 33 blockchains. Wallet trust profiles, EAS attestations, Gitcoin Passport, Farcaster ID, staking positions, compliance templates, ACP/UCP commerce, domain verification, merchant onboarding, USDC key purchase, and credit management. ECDSA-signed booleans, optional Merkle proofs, 26 tools. Used by DJD Agent Score (Coinbase x402).
